product_definition.title: Inventory & Loot System
product_definition.description: A data-driven inventory and loot generation system for UE5.5. Features grid-based inventory UI, item stacking, item rarity tiers, loot tables with weighted probability, and item dropping/picking up. Full multiplayer replication.
product_definition.target_audience: RPG, survival, and action game developers

core_features: UItemDataAsset (DataAsset) defining item stats, icon, mesh, rarity
Loot table DataAsset with weighted random item rolls
Drop item as world pickup actor with physics
Pick up item with overlap detection
Replicated inventory changes via RPC + OnRep
UMG inventory grid widget (drag and drop)
Item rarity tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player walks over pickup, item appears in inventory grid
